mano_cua.result_summary: 虚拟滚动模式下Shift+click选择功能完全失效。3个测试场景均失败：(1)同行内Shift+click无选区高亮，(2)可见范围内跨段Shift+click无选区，(3)滚动多段后Shift+click无选区。光标定位正常但Shift扩展选区完全不工作。根因：虚拟滚动渲染/卸载DOM节点时选区锚点丢失或追踪错误
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The Shift+click selection feature is completely broken in the Huge Document page with virtual scrolling enabled. Neither same-line selection nor cross-paragraph selection creates any visible text highlight. The cursor placement appears to work, but extending the selection via Shift+click fails entirely. This is likely a bug in how the virtual scrolling interacts with Slate's selection model — when virtual scrolling renders/unmounts DOM nodes, the anchor point of the selection may be lost or incorrectly tracked.
